sword_strike.name: Sword Strike
sword_strike.description: A basic slash with a blade. Reliable and straightforward.

staff_bash.name: Staff Bash
staff_bash.description: A solid strike with a wooden staff.

dagger_jab.name: Dagger Jab
dagger_jab.description: A quick stab with a short blade.

war_cry.name: War Cry
war_cry.description: A fierce shout that shakes all enemies' resolve, lowering their Attack.

weaken_armor.name: Weaken Armor
weaken_armor.description: Finds gaps in the enemy's armor, lowering their Defense.

fire_bolt.name: Fire Bolt
fire_bolt.description: Hurls a small bolt of fire. May inflict a burn.

blazing_blade.name: Blazing Blade
blazing_blade.description: Strikes with a sword wreathed in flames.

inferno.name: Inferno
inferno.description: Unleashes a devastating torrent of fire magic.

firebomb.name: Firebomb
firebomb.description: Hurls a blazing bomb that explodes on impact, hitting all enemies at once.

smoke_bomb.name: Smoke Bomb
smoke_bomb.description: Throws a smoke bomb that clouds the enemy's vision, lowering accuracy.

cross_slash.name: Cross Slash
cross_slash.description: A powerful X-shaped slash. High critical-hit ratio.

water_bolt.name: Water Bolt
water_bolt.description: Launches a concentrated bolt of water magic.

shadow_bite.name: Shadow Bite
shadow_bite.description: Strikes from the shadows with dark energy. May cause flinching.

tidal_rush.name: Tidal Rush
tidal_rush.description: Charges forward on a surge of water. Always strikes first.

tidal_wave.name: Tidal Wave
tidal_wave.description: Summons a massive wave to crash upon the enemy.

thorn_lash.name: Thorn Lash
thorn_lash.description: Conjures thorny vines that whip the target.

life_drain.name: Life Drain
life_drain.description: Plants a parasitic seed that siphons the enemy's life force each turn.

leaf_barrage.name: Leaf Barrage
leaf_barrage.description: Launches a volley of razor-sharp enchanted leaves.

slumber_spore.name: Slumber Spore
slumber_spore.description: Releases a cloud of magical spores that put the enemy to sleep.

solar_wrath.name: Solar Wrath
solar_wrath.description: Channels the raw energy of the sun into a devastating beam of light.

shock_bolt.name: Shock Bolt
shock_bolt.description: Fires a small bolt of crackling lightning.

lightning_stab.name: Lightning Stab
lightning_stab.description: Drives a lightning-charged dagger into the target. May paralyze.

swift_strike.name: Swift Strike
swift_strike.description: A lightning-fast attack that always strikes first.

gale_shot.name: Gale Shot
gale_shot.description: Fires an arrow carried by a powerful gust of wind.

iron_guard.name: Iron Guard
iron_guard.description: Raises shields across the whole party, increasing Defense for all allies.

boulder_hurl.name: Boulder Hurl
boulder_hurl.description: Hurls a massive rock at the target.

binding_hex.name: Binding Hex
binding_hex.description: Weaves a sticky hex that greatly slows the target.

poison_scratch.name: Poison Scratch
poison_scratch.description: Rakes the target with filthy, poisoned claws.

dirty_trick.name: Dirty Trick
dirty_trick.description: Throws dirt in the enemy's eyes, sharply lowering their accuracy.

pixie_dust.name: Pixie Dust
pixie_dust.description: Blows a sparkling cloud of enchanted dust that stings the target.

giggle_hex.name: Giggle Hex
giggle_hex.description: A mischievous curse that makes the target laugh uncontrollably, lowering their Sp.Attack.

fae_wind.name: Fae Wind
fae_wind.description: Summons an otherworldly gale infused with fairy magic.

starfall.name: Starfall
starfall.description: Calls down a shower of brilliant falling stars upon the enemy.
